title: Use Company Branding for Exports
excerpt: Hi, why are we unable to remove Monday.com branding and formatting from our exports? I would like to use Monday to create a timeline that we would need to regularly export and send to clients, but it will be a massive pa…

posts.author: Kellie272 (Kellie)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, why are we unable to remove Monday.com branding and formatting from our exports? I would like to use Monday to create a timeline that we would need to regularly export and send to clients, but it will be a massive pain to delete the Monday logo and change up the formatting so it doesn’t look so unprofessional.
